draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation of Mr. Milan Shah, an extraordinary individual with whom I have had the pleasure of working closely. Mr. Shah's remarkable skills and contributions in the field of AI for clinical trials have left a lasting impression on me, and I am confident that he will continue to make significant strides in this area.

Before I delve into the specifics of Mr. Shah's qualifications, allow me to provide some background on myself. I am currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science at CalTech University, where I have had the opportunity to deepen my understanding of advanced technological concepts. My academic journey has been complemented by practical experiences in the industry. Notably, I have served as a Software Developer at the CalTech University School of Medicine, where I honed my skills in PostgreSQL and machine learning, and as an Intern in Sensing & Connectivity at Pear Technologies, where I worked on mobile application development and software engineering.

Currently, I am a Founding Engineer at Verve AI, a company dedicated to enhancing clinical research operations through advanced technological solutions. In this role, I am at the forefront of developing and implementing innovative tools that streamline and accelerate clinical trials, leveraging my expertise in AI and software engineering. This position allows me to apply my academic knowledge and industry experience to real-world challenges in the life sciences sector, contributing to the advancement of medical research and patient care.

Through these experiences, I have developed a keen ability to identify and nurture extraordinary talent. My work at Verve AI, in particular, has provided me with a deep understanding of the skills and qualities necessary for success in the intersection of technology and healthcare. It is from this perspective that I can confidently assess and recommend Mr. Shah's qualifications and potential.

I have had the pleasure of knowing Mr. Shah since our time together at CalTech University, where we were roommates and collaborated on various projects. Our relationship has since evolved into a professional partnership at Verve AI, where we work closely to advance the company's mission of enhancing clinical research operations through innovative technology solutions.

One of the most memorable experiences we shared was participating in TechJam, the world's largest collegiate hackathon hosted at UC San Francisco. This event brought together thousands of students from diverse backgrounds to collaborate on innovative technology projects over a 36-hour period. Mr. Shah and I formed a team to tackle a complex problem in the healthcare space, leveraging our combined expertise in AI and software engineering.

During the hackathon, Mr. Shah's technical prowess and problem-solving abilities were on full display. He played a crucial role in developing a sophisticated machine learning model that addressed the challenge we were working on. His ability to quickly grasp complex concepts and implement effective solutions was truly impressive. Mr. Shah's leadership and collaborative spirit were also evident, as he effectively coordinated our team's efforts and fostered a positive, productive environment.

Our project garnered significant attention from the judges and other participants, and we received valuable feedback that further validated Mr. Shah's skills and contributions. This experience not only strengthened our bond as colleagues but also highlighted Mr. Shah's potential to make a significant impact in the field of AI and healthcare.

At Verve AI, I have had the opportunity to witness Mr. Shah's extraordinary abilities firsthand. As a Co-Founder, he has been instrumental in shaping the company's vision and driving its growth. His deep expertise in AI and clinical trials has been invaluable in developing innovative solutions that address the complex challenges faced by clinical research organizations.

One of Mr. Shah's key contributions to Verve AI has been his work on the development of advanced machine learning models that enhance participant recruitment and engagement in clinical trials. His ability to leverage AI to identify and target potential participants has significantly improved the efficiency and effectiveness of our clients' recruitment efforts. This has not only accelerated the pace of clinical research but also increased the diversity and inclusivity of trial participants, which is crucial for generating robust and generalizable results.

In addition to his technical skills, Mr. Shah has demonstrated exceptional leadership and strategic thinking. He has played a pivotal role in building and nurturing a talented team of engineers and data scientists, fostering a culture of innovation and collaboration. His ability to inspire and motivate others has been a key factor in our company's success.

Mr. Shah's contributions to Verve AI extend beyond his technical and leadership skills. He has been a driving force behind our business development efforts, forging strong relationships with key stakeholders in the life sciences industry. His deep understanding of the clinical research landscape and his ability to articulate the value of our solutions have been instrumental in securing partnerships and driving revenue growth.

Mr. Shah's impact on Verve AI and the broader field of AI for clinical trials cannot be overstated. His unique combination of technical expertise, leadership skills, and strategic vision has been a driving force behind our company's success. I am confident that he will continue to make significant contributions to the field and advance the state of clinical research through his innovative work.

In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Milan Shah as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of AI for clinical trials. His remarkable technical skills, strategic vision, and leadership qualities have been instrumental in advancing the mission of Verve AI and driving innovation in the life sciences industry. Mr. Shah's ability to develop and implement cutting-edge AI solutions has significantly improved the efficiency and effectiveness of clinical research operations, making a tangible impact on the industry.

Having had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Shah, I am confident that he will continue to make significant contributions to the field of AI and healthcare. His unique combination of expertise, dedication, and passion for innovation positions him as a leader in the industry. I have no doubt that he will continue to push the boundaries of what is possible and drive meaningful advancements in clinical research.

Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information or clarification regarding my recommendation of Mr. Shah. I am more than happy to provide additional insights into his qualifications and contributions.

Sincerely,

Ryan Carter

Founding Engineer

Verve AI

[email contact here]
final:
Dear USCIS,

I am honored to present this recommendation in support of Mr. Milan Shah, an exceptional individual whose work I have been privileged to witness firsthand. Mr. Shah's impressive skills and contributions in the realm of AI for clinical trials have deeply influenced me, and I am confident that his trajectory will continue to significantly impact this field.

Allow me to offer a brief background about myself to set the context for my endorsement. I have a robust foundation in software development, which was honed at the CalTech University School of Medicine, where I developed expertise in PostgreSQL and machine learning. My experience was further enriched during my tenure as an intern in Sensing & Connectivity at Pear Technologies, focusing on mobile app development. Currently, I serve as a Founding Engineer at Verve AI, a company dedicated to advancing clinical research operations through pioneering technological solutions. In this role, I develop and implement tools designed to streamline and accelerate clinical trials, effectively applying my background in AI and software engineering. This position allows me to tackle real-world challenges in the life sciences sector, driving forward medical research and enhancing patient care.

These experiences have sharpened my ability to recognize and cultivate outstanding talent. My journey at Verve AI in particular has given me a nuanced understanding of what it takes for someone to succeed at the intersection of technology and healthcare. It is from this vantage point that I can confidently assess and endorse Mr. Shah's qualifications.

My acquaintance with Mr. Shah dates back to our collaborative projects at CalTech University. Over time, our relationship evolved into a professional partnership at Verve AI, where we work closely to further the company's mission of innovating clinical research operations.

At Verve AI, I have observed Mr. Shah's remarkable capabilities firsthand. As a Founder and CEO, he has not only shaped the company's vision but also spearheaded its growth. His expertise in AI and clinical trials has been instrumental in crafting innovative solutions for complex challenges faced by clinical research organizations.

A key contribution by Mr. Shah has been the development of sophisticated machine learning models to enhance participant recruitment and engagement in clinical trials. His strategic use of AI for identifying potential participants has markedly improved the efficiency and effectiveness of recruitment efforts. This advancement has accelerated clinical research and increased participant diversity, ensuring robust and generalizable outcomes.

Beyond technical prowess, Mr. Shah exhibits exceptional leadership and strategic acumen. He has cultivated a talented team of engineers and data scientists, fostering a culture of innovation and cooperation. His leadership has been pivotal in the success of our company.

Additionally, Mr. Shah has played a crucial role in securing substantial funding for Verve AI, raising a total of $4.9 million in venture capital. This includes $3,250,000 from B* Capital, $500,000 from Acorn Capital, $291,972 from Foundation Ventures, $100,000 from Lambda VC, and $100,000 from Paul Nguyen, with additional support from Innovate VC. This financial endorsement reflects his ability to communicate the value of our technology and secure essential resources for continued growth.

Mr. Shah's influence extends beyond Verve AI. He has been instrumental in business development, forging significant relationships with leaders in the life sciences industry. His comprehensive understanding of the clinical research landscape and articulate communication of our solutions have secured strategic partnerships and driven revenue growth. His contributions to Verve AI and the wider field of AI for clinical trials have been transformative.

Moreover, Mr. Shah's impact on the healthcare technology space is also evident through his role as a judge at TechJam, one of the largest collegiate hackathons. His involvement underscores his dedication to encouraging innovation and mentoring emerging talent in tech. His assessments have guided participants in crafting innovative solutions with real-world applications.

Furthermore, his expertise extends to advising on potential investments for B* Capital, where he evaluates emerging technologies and identifies promising opportunities. His insights into investment strategies align with cutting-edge innovations, further highlighting his substantial industry expertise and influence.

In brief, Mr. Milan Shah exemplifies a remarkable blend of technical expertise, visionary leadership, and a steadfast commitment to advancing the field of AI in healthcare. His work at Verve AI, along with his broader contributions in fostering innovation and guiding investment strategies, underscores his pivotal role in transforming the clinical trial landscape. I am confident that Mr. Shah will continue to significantly impact the industry through his pioneering efforts and dedication to technological advancement. It is with great enthusiasm and trust in his abilities that I recommend Mr. Shah for any opportunity that will benefit from his exceptional skills and insight.

Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information or clarification regarding my recommendation of Mr. Shah. I am more than happy to provide additional insights into his qualifications and contributions.

Sincerely,




Ryan Carter
Founding Engineer
Verve AI
[email contact here]
